top_signals.title: Hungary to Meet Euro Entry Criteria by 2030, Premier Magyar Says
top_signals.summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said his country could meet the European Union’s economic criteria for adopting the euro by 2030, setting out the clearest timetable yet for a path toward the common currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rise in memory chip costs puts pressure on retailers of laptops and smartphones
top_signals.summary: As the global race for AI moves forward, a shortage of memory chips has begun to drive up prices of consumer electronics and may lead to product shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
top_signals.summary: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
